title: Chalaq #2510
definition:
Halak = "smooth"

 1) a mountain in southern Judah which is the southern limit of
    Joshua's conquest; site unknown
nasbUsage:
Definition: Halak = "smooth"

 1) a mountain in southern Judah which is the southern limit of
    Joshua's conquest; site unknown

    NASB:  smooth, a mountain S. of the Dead Sea
